hooks.command: CHANGES=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$CHANGES" ] && exit 0; echo "$CHANGES" | grep -q '\.claude/SESSION_LOG\.md' && exit 0; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"This session modified files but .claude/SESSION_LOG.md was not updated. Per the protocol in CLAUDE.md, append a dated entry to SESSION_LOG.md summarizing what changed and which files were touched. If a top-level feature, table, convention, or directory changed, also refresh the relevant section of CLAUDE.md. Then stop."}'
